parsed_review.summary: CP00-362 is a descriptor-only RP11 closeout pack (risk C, 150 units, RP11.P08.M08.S02-RP11.P09.M08.S08) closing the P08 Hermes phase and opening the P09 review foundation as twelve descriptor-only sections. Independent read-only inspection of the actual source (registry.js, service.js, validators.js, test/model.test.js, contract JSON, validator script, README) confirms full internal consistency with the prompt baseline, the live closeout-pack-plan.json (CP00-362 is the live cursor head), the manifest, and command-evidence. Verified: unit/deliverable/phase/micro-section counts match everywhere; freezeCp362Result and the descriptor validator force all runtime/write/leak flags false and assert descriptor-only, customer-safe, no-raw-payload, no permission/UI/leak invariants; no I/O, state writes, runtime dispatch, or Hermes runtime receipts exist (Hermes patterns confined to deterministic review packet/receipt descriptors); authority boundary holds (claude_is_final_approval false, human_final_approval_required true, enterprise trust not claimed from local validation); CP178+ forbidden_review_evidence covers auth failure, zero-byte, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing-field cases; readiness auth preflight passed with non-zero well-formed JSON. The pack correctly sets production_ready=false (status implemented_pending_review); the production_ready_candidate (descriptor-verified) is supported by coverage.valid && foundation.valid, both confirmed by inspection. All 7 required public exports present; validator enforces deepEqual contract-to-registry parity. Pending post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are the expected outputs of this review and subsequent human adjudication/inspection per the hardened_review_sequence, not defects. Unrelated dirty/untracked files are correctly segregated and not attributed to the pack. Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approval authority. No findings at any severity.
